main.description: List the caller's recent notifications: replies to their posts, @-mentions of their handle in others' posts, and new follows on them. Mirrors app.bsky.notification.listNotifications with a minimal output shape. v1 always returns isRead = false (no read-state persistence yet).

reason.description: What kind of event triggered this notification.

reasonSubject.description: For reply: URI of the post being replied to. For mention: URI of the post containing the mention. Absent for follow.

record.description: The raw record value that triggered the notification (ait.feed.post or ait.graph.follow).

isRead.description: Always false in v1; read-state persistence deferred.
